title: rubus hilsianus
intro: Rubus hilsianus, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to help in reducing swelling and fighting free radicals in the body. The health benefits of Rubus hilsianus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
